transcript: Scanned source and previewed metadata plus label carrier interpretation.
Reviewed label column, anchor, time model, and granularity.
Validation required confirmation for missing metadata.
Confirmed apply loaded the interpreted source.

dialog.title: Interpret Data Source
visible_text: Scan -> Preview -> Validate -> Confirm -> Apply -> Save recipe
Found 1 EEG file(s) and 1 label/event carrier(s).

Confirmation required: Confirm label carrier alignment, anchor event, and class map before applying.; Confirm run metadata for product_replay_raw.fif.; Confirm session metadata for product_replay_raw.fif.; Confirm subject metadata for product_replay_raw.fif.; Confirm task metadata for product_replay_raw.fif.
dialog.review_notes:
Warnings:
- External label/event carriers require preview before apply.
Confirmations:
- Confirm label carrier alignment, anchor event, and class map before applying.
- Confirm run metadata for product_replay_raw.fif.
- Confirm session metadata for product_replay_raw.fif.
- Confirm subject metadata for product_replay_raw.fif.
- Confirm task metadata for product_replay_raw.fif.
Downstream impact:
- Applying this interpretation will replace active raw data and invalidate downstream preprocessing, epochs, datasets, training, and saliency for the current session.
Format capabilities:
- BIDS events: needs review. BIDS events use onset and duration with label columns such as trial_type or value; review event column and sidecar semantics.
- MNE FIF: supported. FIF can be loaded as an EEG recording; review metadata and events before supervised training.
